title: phyllanthodendron poilanei
intro: Phyllanthodendron poilanei is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, also known as an endangered tropical tree native to Vietnam. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its use in treating liver and kidney disorders, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthodendron poilanei include its ability to protect against liver damage, improve kidney function, and reduce oxidative stress. In traditional herbal medicine, Phyllanthodendron poilanei is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
